who: finance managers at small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For finance managers at small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, overspending causes cash flow gaps. We automatically audit subscription expenses instead of manual tracking of subscriptions and expenses.
problem: Overspending on recurring subscription expenses due to lack of visibility and anomaly detection.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for finance managers
Indie Hackers discussions on expense management
DM outreach to finance managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for finance tools
try_it: Let users try monthly expense report generation and anomaly flagging for unusual charges on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
